message:
test(unit): expand test_artifacts (5→43) and gc (7→32) inline tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

test_artifacts: validation edge cases (schema version, empty run_id, empty
test_case_id, empty artifacts, empty path, negative timing, percentile
ordering), ArtifactCorrelation has_additional_identity per-field, serde
roundtrips for all enums with snake_case verification, StageTimingMetrics,
ArtifactEntry, Display for all error variants, Hash trait for enums.

gc: CacheGcSettings/CacheCompactionStats defaults/clone/debug,
normalized_vacuum_threshold boundaries/infinity, free_page_ratio edge
cases (zero, negative, exceeds total), should_vacuum boundary/zero/one
threshold, compact_u64_map empty/superset/all-active cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
